evals.prompt: I want to spec a CSV export feature. The user should be able to download all their tasks as a CSV file via GET /tasks/export.
evals.expected_output: spec.md and plan.md are created at mini-sdd/specs/csv-export/. spec.md has status: ready, filled Summary/Scenarios/Acceptance Criteria sections using GIVEN/WHEN/THEN format, and a non-placeholder created date. plan.md has at least one concrete task.
expectations: mini-sdd/specs/csv-export/spec.md is created
spec.md frontmatter status is 'ready'
spec.md frontmatter created is not a placeholder (YYYY-MM-DD)
spec.md contains a ## Summary section
spec.md contains at least one GIVEN/WHEN/THEN scenario
spec.md contains at least two acceptance criteria (AC1, AC2)
mini-sdd/specs/csv-export/plan.md is created
plan.md contains at least one task (- [ ])

evals.prompt: Update the search-notes spec to also support filtering by tag. Add a `?tag=` query parameter that returns only notes tagged with the given value.
evals.expected_output: spec.md updated field is refreshed, the new tag-filter scenario / acceptance criteria are added, and existing content is preserved. plan.md has a new dated section appended with new tasks — old tasks are untouched.
expectations: spec.md updated field is changed from 2026-03-15 (not left as original)
spec.md status remains 'ready'
spec.md still contains the original Scenario 1 (keyword search) content
spec.md contains a new scenario or acceptance criterion related to tag filtering
plan.md still contains the original four tasks from the first iteration
plan.md contains new tasks appended in a new section (not replacing the old ones)

evals.prompt: I want to spec a create-post feature. Authors should be able to publish a new blog post with a title and body. Only registered users can create posts.
evals.expected_output: spec.md and plan.md are created at mini-sdd/specs/create-post/. spec.md status is 'ready' and requires: [user-registration] is set because posts require an existing user — either inferred automatically or confirmed with the user.
expectations: mini-sdd/specs/create-post/spec.md is created
spec.md frontmatter status is 'ready'
spec.md frontmatter requires contains 'user-registration'
spec.md contains a ## Summary section describing post creation
spec.md contains at least one scenario covering the happy path (author publishes a post)
mini-sdd/specs/create-post/plan.md is created
plan.md contains at least one task (- [ ])
